Freelancing with AI

4 min read
Just now

--

Okay so last month I was a mess.
Deadline. Another deadline. And one client who kept saying can we hop on a quick call at 11pm.
I was done. 
So I did what everyone on Twitter was saying. 
Just use AI dude.
I opened ChatGPT. 2am. 
Typed: write proposal for web design client please
It gave me 4 paragraphs. In 20 seconds. 
I did not even read it. Just hit send.
Next day: We went with another freelancer. Thanks though.
That hurt.
For the next 2 weeks I went crazy with AI. 
Emails. Proposals. Even replied to my mom with AI. 
I was fast. But I sounded like a robot.
One guy from Canada literally asked me: dear did you use chatgpt for this 
I said no. 
Then I could not sleep that night.
I was about to quit AI completely.
But then it hit me. The problem was not AI. 
The problem was I was being lazy.
AI is not me. 
AI is like that cousin who talks too fast and uses big words to sound smart.
You have to tell him to shut up and talk normal.
So here is what I do now. And it actually works.
Step 1. Only use AI for the boring stuff
I stopped asking it to write.
Now I ask: give me 10 problems shopify owners have right now 
Or: list reasons why emails get ignored
10 seconds. List ready. 
Then I pick 2 things from that list that actually happened to me.
Like last year I had this client in Karachi. 
His ads stopped working after iPhone update. We panicked for 3 days. 
I use that story now.
See the difference? 
Clients in US UK Canada are tired of in today's digital world crap. 
They want: this happened. this is what I did.
In Pakistan we do not have time to google for 2 hours. 
I get it. I am from Lahore. Wifi goes. Power goes. 
AI saves that time. But you still have to add YOU.
Rule: Ask AI to brainstorm. Not to write.
Step 2. Make AI copy your voice
This changed everything for me.
I copied 3 emails I sent that got me hired. 
Pasted them in ChatGPT and said: talk like this. Short. Messy. No fancy words.
Now drafts come back and I am like yeah this sounds like me. 
Just need to fix 30% and add one story.
My friend Aisha. She does writing on Upwork from Lahore. 
She was getting zero replies. 
We fed AI her old WhatsApp chats with clients. 
Now her proposals start with: hey i saw you said traffic dropped. same thing happened to me last month 
Her reply rate went crazy. 1 out of 10 to like 4 out of 10.
Because people hire people. Not templates.
Step 3. Use AI to personalize fast
Copy pasting same proposal equals death. 
Writing 20 different ones equals also death.
So I found a hack.
Read job post. Find 2 details. 
Tell AI: use these 2 details and give me 2 opening lines
Then I add 1 line myself. Something dumb and real.
Example: 
Client: need emails for fitness coach. people quit week 2 
AI: you said people quit after week 2. that is the hardest part 
Me: i quit 2 gyms last year so i get it
4 minutes. Done. 
Sounds human because it IS half human. Me.
Step 4. Read it out loud like a weirdo
Serious. This is the rule.
After AI gives draft, I read it in my room. Out loud. 
If I cringe, delete. 
If it sounds like LinkedIn, delete. 
If I would not say this to a client on zoom, rewrite.
AI gets me 70% there. 
My voice gets the job.
Tools I use. Only 3.
I tried like 10 tools. Waste of money.
ChatGPT free. For ideas. 
Grammarly free. To kill robotic words. 
Notion. To dump client notes.
That is it.
In Pakistan we cannot pay 20 dollars for Jasper. And honestly do not need to. 
My friend in US uses premium tools. I use free ChatGPT and more coffee. 
Same results.
3 dumb mistakes I made
1. Let AI write my whole portfolio. 
Interview came. Client asked explain this project. 
I blanked. Because I did not write it. Never again.
2. Used AI for strategy. 
Big mistake. Clients pay you to think. Not to type. 
If AI does the thinking, why would they hire you?
3. Forgot proof. 
AI cannot add screenshot of your 2k month. 
AI cannot say: i messed up first ad and lost 40 dollars. 
You have to. That is what makes people trust you.
What happened after
I started sending more proposals. 5 a day. 
People started replying. 
And I had time to actually do good work instead of just chasing work.
AI did not take my job. 
It just took the parts I hated.
For freelancers in Pakistan reading this
We have extra issues. Paypal. Clients asking where are you from. 
Use AI for that too. 
Ask: how do I explain Wise payment to US client 
Ask: how to handle timezone difference
But do not hide you are from Lahore or Karachi or Islamabad. 
That is your story. Use it. Clients like different.
The only rule
If client can tell you used AI equals you did it wrong 
If client feels heard because you replied fast equals you did it right
AI should make you sound more like you. Not less.
Do this today
Take one job post. 
5 min outline with AI. 
Write first paragraph yourself. Add one mistake. 
Send.
Someone will reply: this feels different.
Because it is. It is you. Just less tired.
P.S. I wrote this at 1am with tea. If there are typos, blame the tea.
